data.title: Possible DOGE breakdown: $0.07 target with whales selling at $0.10. Rejection at $0.10 likely, then down to $0.07.
data.description: The inability of Dogecoin to surpass the 200-day Moving Average at $0.13 indicates a lack of institutional support. It is anticipated that there will be resistance at the $0.10 mark, with a subsequent drop to the $0.07 level expected.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Steel Dynamics Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Steel Dynamics, Inc. is scheduled to announce their first quarter earnings on April 20th after market close. Analysts are anticipating earnings of $2.79 per share, which is an increase from $1.44 per share in the previous year's first quarter. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $5.06 billion, compared to $4.37 billion from the previous year. In their March 17 guidance, Steel Dynamics projected earnings in the range of $2.73 to $2.77 per share. Following this news, the company's stock rose by 2.3%, closing at $200.32 on Friday. For further insights, readers can find the latest analyst ratings on Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: InPHRED Expands into Data Center Optical Interconnect Market with InP VCSEL and Micro-RC-LED Solutions
data.description: InPHRED, a cutting-edge photonics solutions creator based in Boston, has expanded their nanoporous semiconductor platform to cater to ultra-short-reach optical input/output and intra-data-center optical interconnects for future AI infrastructure needs. This move signifies a strategic direction towards enhancing data transfer capabilities within data centers. The company's focus on this area highlights its commitment to advancing technology in alignment with the demands of the modern digital landscape. The announcement was made on April 20, 2026.

data.title: Government shutdown in El Paso due to disputes and laser weapon use, causing city chaos.
data.description: Last night, city residents experienced disruptions due to a high-energy laser weapon incident and conflicts between federal agencies. The intense laser weapon caused havoc, leading to chaos and inconvenience for the city's inhabitants. Additionally, disagreements between government entities escalated, creating further disturbances in the area. The situation resulted in a challenging night for the city, with many individuals affected by the incidents.

data.title: Black Rifle Coffee Company Announces Dates for Its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Veteran-led premium beverage company, BRC Inc. (NYSE: BRCC) will unveil its Q1 2026 financial results after market close on May 4, 2026. The company, also known as Black Rifle, plans to hold a conference call the next day at 8:30 a.m. ET on May 5, 2026, to discuss these results. The call can be accessed through a webcast on the company's investor relations website at ir.blackriflecoffee.co.

data.title: Tencent Music Entertainment Group Releases 2025 ESG Report
data.description: In Shenzhen, China on April 20, 2026, Tencent Music Entertainment Group, known as TME and listed on NYSE as TME and HKEX as 1698, a prominent online music and audio entertainment platform in China, unveiled its 2025 Environmental, Social, and Governance ("ESG") Report. The report outlines the company's initiatives and performance in these areas for the past year.

data.title: Q1 2026 results and conference call set for May 13, 2026. Save the date! 📊🗓️ #financials #conferencecall
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.8%, marking a decrease from the previous rate of 5.2%. This improvement indicates that more individuals are finding employment opportunities. Additionally, the report showed that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, exceeding expectations. The job market appears to be gaining momentum, with various sectors contributing to this growth, including the technology and healthcare industries. Experts believe that these positive trends reflect a recovering economy and offer hope for those seeking employment.

data.title: Thunderstruck Ag Expands Into Brazil With Yetter and Martin Products, Introducing Proven Planting Solutions to Improve Consistency and Crop Performance
data.description: A global provider of farmer-driven equipment solutions, Thunderstruck Ag, is making its mark in Brazil by introducing Yetter and Martin products under the Thunderstruck Brazil umbrella. This move brings established planting technology to Brazilian farmers and dealers for the first time. The expansion includes a range of row crop solutions from Yetter and Martin, such as residue managers and planter attachments, aimed at enhancing seedbed conditions. This initiative marks Thunderstruck Ag's entry into Brazil and offers innovative solutions to the agriculture sector in the country.

data.title: Ennis, Inc. Reports Results for the Quarter and Year Ended February 28, 2026, Sets Record Date for Annual Shareholder Meeting
data.description: Ennis, Inc. announced its financial results for the quarter and fiscal year ending February 28, 2026. The company, listed on NYSE as EBF, reported revenues of $96.4 million for the quarter, showing a 4.0% increase of $3.7 million from the previous year's fourth quarter. For the fiscal year, revenues were $392.4 million, indicating a slight decrease of $2.2 million or 0.6% compared to the prior fiscal year. Earnings per diluted share for the current quarter remained steady at $0.35, the same as the previous year's fourth quarter.

data.title: Dole plc Schedules First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Release
data.description: Dole plc (NYSE: DOLE) is set to reveal its Q1 2026 financial results on May 11, 2026, before the market opens. The management will conduct a webcast at 08:00 a.m. ET on the same day. A presentation will be available on the company's website, along with a press release and additional financial data. The live webcast and a post-event replay can be found at www.dol.

data.title: Heineken N.V. updates on share buyback progress, purchasing $500 million worth of shares.
data.description: A new study has revealed alarming statistics about the impact of the recent surge in Covid-19 cases. The data shows that there have been over 100,000 new cases reported in the last week alone, with a significant increase in hospitalizations. Additionally, the study found that the new variant of the virus is more contagious and has led to a 30% rise in deaths compared to previous strains. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: CommLoan Hits 1,000 Lenders as Data-Driven Marketplace Expands Borrower's Access to CRE Capital
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, there has been notable growth in the proprietary dataset utilized by CommLoan, a commercial real estate lending technology firm based in Scottsdale, Arizona. This dataset powers their AI-driven loan matching system, enhancing accuracy and competitiveness within commercial real estate lending. The advancements in this dataset have significantly improved the precision and efficacy of loan matching, leading to increased competition in the sector.

data.title: Jumbo Bags Market to Reach USD 10.4 Billion by 2036, Driven by Bulk Handling Efficiency and Global Trade Expansion | Future Market Insights
data.description: In a recent market analysis conducted by Future Market Insights, it has been reported that the global jumbo bags market is currently experiencing a period of steady growth. This growth can be attributed to the rising trend among industries to utilize flexible bulk packaging solutions, which aid in enhancing transport efficiency and storage capabilities. The analysis suggests that this shift towards jumbo bags has been instrumental in driving the market forward. With this trend in mind, experts predict a positive outlook for the jumbo bags market in the coming years. This development underscores the importance of adapting to more efficient and versatile packaging solutions in various industries worldwide.

data.title: Guardsquare to Address the Growing Piracy Risk Targeting Streaming Apps at NAB Show Las Vegas
data.description: In Boston and Las Vegas, a recent presentation highlighted the growing concern of compromised mobile apps as a major vulnerability for streaming platforms. The presentation focused on the increasing trend of mobile apps being targeted as a primary attack surface for cyber threats. With the rise in usage of streaming services, the number of compromised mobile apps has spiked, posing a serious risk to user data and security. Experts discussed strategies to address this issue and protect streaming platforms, emphasizing the importance of API security.

data.title: TechCreate Group Ltd. and pQCee Intend to Collaborate on One of the First Quantum-Safe QR Hybrid POS Terminal
data.description: TechCreate Group Ltd. (NYSE American: TCGL) revealed plans to partner with pQCee Pte Ltd, a quantum cybersecurity solutions provider, to investigate integrating NIST approved Post-quantum cryptography (PQC) algorithms in its operations. TechCreate is a technology consultancy firm focusing on payment solutions, cybersecurity, and digital services. The collaboration aims to enhance security measures through cutting-edge encryption techniques.

data.title: Manufacturing Solution Provider LeadSoft Introduces Industrial Electrical Design Platform to Accelerate Global Deployment
data.description: LeadSoft Co., Ltd., a long-standing player in industrial electrical digitalization software based in Suzhou, China, with 30 years of experience, is expanding its presence in global markets, with Hannover Messe 2026 marking a significant step in its international growth plans. The company's focus at the event includes showcasing its innovative solutions and technologies to a wider audience as part of its strategy to penetrate new markets.
